name: Can using ChatGPT get my lawyer disbarred like those news stories?
description: No, only unverified misuse leads to sanctions, not use itself.[2]

mainEntity.name: Can using ChatGPT get my lawyer disbarred like those news stories?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, only unverified misuse leads to sanctions, not use itself.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Disbarment is unlikely for mere use; sanctions occur for submitting unverified fabricated content, as in 2023 NY and Utah cases.[2][3] Misuse, not use, triggers discipline.[2] Key factors: Failure to verify; ethical violations; client harm. Ensure your lawyer verifies all AI outputs; report concerns to bar if needed. Proper use enhances efficiency safely.
